title: lepidocupania glabra
intro: Lepidocupania glabra, also known as glabrous lepidocarpa, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Melastomataceae. It is native to certain regions in South America. Lepidocupania glabra has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its health benefits, such as reducing fever and promoting wound healing.
